ship.releaseNotes:
### Blackwell Ops release

**CORE_** assets: App `.7z`, Full NSIS Setup (includes GGML Master Frontier+Stable).

**PLUGIN_** assets: optional engine packs — ship separately via DISTRIBUTION Pack+Ship per plugin (not part of Full pack).
ship.appOnlyReleaseNotes:
### App update (`CORE_Blackwell-Ops-App-v*.7z`)

Lean portable pack (~5 MB) - **UI, core templates, plugin catalog, bundled 7z**.

Refreshes the **engine catalog** (Tom TQ, bee-llama, etc.) - install optional engines from Config - UPDATES. They appear in PROVIDERS after download.

**How to apply:** in-app **UPDATE** menu (download, extract, restart). Keeps existing engines under `runtime/`.

**First install?** Use **Full install** (`CORE_*Setup*.exe`) from Updates catalog.
ship.fullBundleReleaseNotes:
### Full install (`CORE_*Setup*.exe`)

Core installer: **app + GGML Master engines** (Frontier + Stable).

Also attaches lean App `.7z`. Optional **PLUGIN_** packs are not included — pack/ship those per engine when needed.

**Choose this when:** first-time install or weekly Master engine refresh.
ship.providerReleaseNotes:
### Engine pack (`PLUGIN_{provider}-{profile}.7z` or `CORE_ggml-master-{profile}.7z`)

Runtime extract via Config - UPDATES.

Stop any running engine for that provider before updating.
